findings.description: File at 365 lines exceeds glue hard ceiling of 300. Phase H will split orchestration further (run_stages_0_3 / run_gate1 / run_stages_4_10). Acceptable for this transitional extraction step.

notes: run_daily() code moved from app.py. No new logic. All LLM calls remain through gateway/async_client.py which is input_guard-wired. 754 tests pass.
